message:
test: add E2E tests for undo command

Adds 15 comprehensive E2E tests covering:
- Un-deprecate action (restore deprecated bullets)
- Undo-feedback action (remove helpful/harmful feedback)
- Hard-delete action with confirmation
- Dry-run mode for all actions
- JSON output validation
- Error handling (bullet not found, not deprecated)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
